name: Crunchy Chocolate Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2 quart saucepan, combine corn syrup and brown sugar.
2. Cook and stir until the mixture comes to a full boil.
3. Stir in peanut butter.
4. Remove from heat.
5. Stir in cereal, chocolate pieces, and vanilla.
6. Press into an ungreased 9x9x2 inch pan.
7. Chill for 1 hour.
8. Cut into bars.
Note: From "The Ultimate Peanut Butter Cookbook" by Arthur Boze.
